achievements.name: Battlewise
achievements.description:
Win {0} Ranked Battle in either the
Single Battle or Double Battle format!

achievements.name: Big Spender
achievements.description: Spend {0} VP in the Shop screen!

achievements.name: Single Battle Sweeper
achievements.description:
Win {0} Ranked Battle in the Single Battle
format without any of your team fainting!

achievements.name: Double Battle Sweeper
achievements.description:
Win {0} Ranked Battle in the Double Battle
format without any of your team fainting!

achievements.name: Outerwear Collector
achievements.description:
Collect {0} clothing item categorized
as outerwear! (Tops do not count.)

achievements.name: Bottoms Collector
achievements.description:
Collect {0} clothing item categorized
as bottoms!

achievements.name: Pokémon Champion
achievements.description:
End {0} Ranked Battles season in the
Champion Tier!

economy.label: Permanent recruit
economy.note: Recruit a Pokémon permanently from The Ranch. A Teammate Ticket can be spent instead of VP.

economy.label: Trial recruit
economy.note: Free 7-day trial of a Pokémon. Trial Pokémon cannot be trained (no SP investment or nature changes).

economy.label: Quick Coupon
economy.note: Skips The Ranch's 22-hour recruitment cycle so the next recruit is available immediately.

economy.label: Affinity Ticket
economy.note: Biases a Ranch recruit toward a chosen type.

economy.label: Mega Stone
economy.note: Each. Reg M-B allows one Mega Evolution per battle (the format's gimmick).

economy.label: SP training
economy.note: Per Stat Point. 66 SP total per Pokémon, max 32 per stat; Champions has no IVs.

economy.label: Season-end payout (Poke Ball Rank 4)
economy.note: Lowest season-end reward; payouts scale up the ladder.

economy.label: Season-end payout (Master Ball Rank 1)
economy.note: High-end season-end reward; payouts scale with final tier.

economy.label: First-time promotion reward
economy.note: The first time you reach a tier you earn a Trainer Title and additional Box slots.

economy.label: Ranked match win
economy.note: Per-match VP. Single-source figure; treat as approximate.

economy.label: Ranked match loss
economy.note: Per-match VP. Single-source figure; treat as approximate.

economy.label: Daily mission total
economy.note: Approximate daily VP from missions. Single-source; treat as approximate.

economy.label: Weekly mission total
economy.note: Approximate weekly VP from missions. Single-source; treat as approximate.

sources_note: Reg M-B: 208 legal species / 76 Megas. The 76-Mega figure independently matches the mega-form count in champout's personal.json. Seasons + ladder reset rules: champsdex.com, victoryroad.pro. Recruitment (recruit/trial/coupon/ticket costs): games.gg. Season-end payouts + first-promotion titles: game8, keengamer. Per-match and daily/weekly mission VP: NeonLightsMedia (single unverified source, flagged uncertain). Mega Stone / nature / SP costs verified in Pokémon Champions by the PM. Captured 2026-07-11.
